home.link_desc: Paste the long URL below to create a short, redirecting link.

dynamic_id_dialog.title: Enter Custom ID
dynamic_id_dialog.description: Choose a unique identifier. This will be used in your snippet's URL.

display.burn_after_read_warning: Warning: This is a one-time snippet and will be deleted after being read.

history.title: History
history.no_history_desc: Your snippet history will appear here

messages.id_conflict: This ID is already taken. Please try another one.

about_page.title: About
about_page.subtitle: A passion project built by two developers who believe in making code sharing simple and beautiful.
about_page.features_subtitle: Everything you need for seamless code sharing

syntax_highlighting.title: Syntax Highlighting
syntax_highlighting.desc: Beautiful code display with support for 15+ programming languages.

ai_detection.title: AI Language Detection
ai_detection.desc: Automatically detects programming languages using AI technology.

custom_ids.title: Custom URLs
custom_ids.desc: Create memorable, custom URLs for easy snippet sharing.

expiration.title: Expiration Control
expiration.desc: Set snippets to expire after 1 hour to 1 year, or keep them forever.

multi_language.title: Multi-Language UI
multi_language.desc: Interface available in English, German, Hindi, Japanese, and Marathi.

dark_mode.title: Dark Mode
dark_mode.desc: Easy on the eyes with a beautiful dark theme option.

open_source.title: Open Source
open_source.desc: Free and open source. Contribute, fork, or self-host.

redirect_urls.title: Shorten Links
redirect_urls.desc: Create short, manageable links that redirect to any destination instantly.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Snipit was born from a simple idea: code sharing should be beautiful, fast, and effortless. As developers, we found ourselves constantly sharing code snippets with colleagues, friends, and the community, but existing solutions felt clunky and outdated.
story.p2: So we decided to build something better. Snipit combines elegant design with powerful functionality, making it the perfect tool for developers who care about both form and function.
story.p3: Built with modern web technologies and a focus on user experience, Snipit aims to be the go-to platform for code sharing in the developer community.

contribute.title: Want to Contribute?
contribute.desc: Snipit is open source and we welcome contributions from the community. Whether it's bug fixes, new features, or documentation improvements, every contribution matters.

error_page.title: Page Not Found
error_page.subtitle: Oops! The snippet you're looking for doesn't exist or has expired.
error_page.description: It might have been deleted, the link could be incorrect, or the snippet may have reached its expiration date.
